response.justification: Bogdan brings over 15 years of broad full-stack and systems engineering experience, and his work at Sociomantic on high-throughput micro-services demonstrates real distributed systems chops. However, the role is highly specialized around growth engineering, experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature-flagging infrastructure, telemetry pipelines, and statistical analysis — none of which appear anywhere in this resume. There is no evidence of cross-team platform ownership, experiment design, metrics infrastructure, or the IC6-level technical leadership required to drive multi-workstream growth initiatives.
strengths: 15+ years of polyglot engineering across TypeScript, C++, C#, Java, DLang, and more — covers several required language categories
Demonstrated high-throughput distributed systems experience at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency async I/O
Current role at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, showing alignment with the AI-first engineering direction
concerns: Zero experimentation platform or feature-flagging experience: no A/B testing, rollout automation, experiment assignment, or bias detection work anywhere in the resume
No telemetry, metrics, or growth measurement infrastructure experience; data aptitude required by the role is entirely absent
Seniority gap: titled Senior/Staff with no evidence of IC6-level cross-team technical leadership, architectural ownership across multiple teams, or driving company-wide engineering platforms
